'''kalaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kysse|kysse]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-l-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kysse|kysse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| kalaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kælæzæth|kælæzæth]] || [[word:kælæzæj|kælæzæj]] || [[word:kælæzæsh|kælæzæsh]] || [[word:kælæzæ|kælæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kalalazath|kalalazath]] || [[word:kalalazaj|kalalazaj]] || [[word:kalalazash|kalalazash]] || [[word:kalalaza|kalalaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kalazath|kalazath]] || [[word:kalazaj|kalazaj]] || [[word:kalazash|kalazash]] || [[word:kalaza|kalaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kalafzath|kalafzath]] || [[word:kalafzaj|kalafzaj]] || [[word:kalafzash|kalafzash]] || [[word:kalafzaf|kalafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kalazatha|kalazatha]] || [[word:kalazaja|kalazaja]] || [[word:kalazasha|kalazasha]] || [[word:kalazaka|kalazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kalazath|kalazath]] || [[word:kalazaj|kalazaj]] || [[word:kalazash|kalazash]] || [[word:kalaza|kalaza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kalazathal|kalazathal]] || [[word:kalazajal|kalazajal]] || [[word:kalazashal|kalazashal]] || [[word:kalazakal|kalazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kalazathatha|kalazathatha]] || [[word:kalazajaja|kalazajaja]] || [[word:kalazashasha|kalazashasha]] || [[word:kalazaka|kalazaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kalazathan|kalazathan]] || [[word:kalazajan|kalazajan]] || [[word:kalazashan|kalazashan]] || [[word:kalazakan|kalazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kalazathaoro|kalazathaoro]] || [[word:kalazajaoro|kalazajaoro]] || [[word:kalazashaoro|kalazashaoro]] || [[word:kalazakaoro|kalazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
